# FreshBasket

FreshBasket is an online grocery delivery platform that provides fresh organic fruits, vegetables, dairy products, seafood, and daily essentials.

## Main Pages
- Home: /
- Fruits: /fruits
- Dairy: /dairy
- Seafood: /seafood
- All Products: /all-products

## Description
FreshBasket focuses on delivering fresh, healthy, and organic groceries directly to customers with fast delivery and easy online shopping experience.

## Tech Stack
- React
- Vite
- Tailwind CSS
- React Router

## Purpose
This site is an ecommerce grocery platform built for fast, mobile-friendly shopping experience.
